seasonal_farm.title: Build a 4-season farm rotation — plant crops appropriate to each Serene Seasons season

cask_brew.title: Fill a Hearth & Harvest Cask — brew a seasonal preserved food or beverage

subtitle.text: Serene Seasons makes farming a planning problem. Plan 4 seasons ahead. The cask does the rest.

description: CH.15 · THE HARVEST CALENDAR
▸ Serene Seasons changes crop viability by season.
Not all crops grow in all seasons.
The farm needs to rotate. The planner needs to rotate.
Ch15 is post-dragon homecoming — you now have time
to sit with the seasons instead of fighting through them.
Build the 4-season rotation. Let it run.
◈ SERENE SEASONS CROP SCHEDULE
└ Spring: Wheat, Carrot, Potato, Beetroot
(most staple crops — high spring fertility)
└ Summer: Melons, Pumpkins, Sugar Cane, Bamboo
(high-yield water crops; heat-tolerant)
└ Autumn: Nether Wart (Overworld autumn = Nether climate analog)
Mushrooms; most farm mods unlock autumn-specific crops
└ Winter: most crops stop growing
Use winter for: Cask brewing, food processing, building
└ Check Serene Seasons calendar in JEI or mod guide
for your specific mod version crop schedule
◈ HEARTH & HARVEST CASK
└ Cask: fermentation/preservation container
└ Requires: Tapper (tree sap), Salt (salt deposits),
Crow (for crop loss prevention around farms)
└ Fill Cask: specific seasonal ingredients → aged food/drink
└ Aged products: superior nutrition stats vs fresh versions
└ Winter use: fill casks in autumn, harvest preserved food in spring
└ Salt: required for preservation mechanics
Salt deposits found in arid/desert biomes
◈ FARM AUTOMATION
└ Create Mechanical Harvester: automates crop harvesting
Pair with Conveyor Belt → Chest for hands-free farming
└ Hearth & Harvest Scarecrow: prevents crow crop damage
(Crows peck crops — Scarecrow prevents loss in range)
└ Farm & Charm Scarecrow: similar mechanic — one per farm
▸ The kingdom runs on food.
The food runs on seasons.
The seasons run on their own schedule regardless of your plans.
The cask is how you bank summer surplus for winter shortage.
Plan the rotation. Fill the casks.
The harvest calendar is a 4-chapter promise
you make to yourself every spring.
▶ Build a 4-season crop rotation farm [check]
▶ Fill a Hearth & Harvest Cask [check]
◇ Serene Seasons + Farmer's Delight: seasonal crops
feed directly into FD cooking recipes.
Match your FD meal prep to seasonal availability.
Autumn is the best cooking season:
most ingredients available, best preservation window.
